title: Security Notice: Former Helm APT Mirror Domain `baltocdn.com` Statement
summary: The Helm Security Team has received third-party reports that the ownership on the former community-maintained Debian/Ubuntu APT mirror domain, baltocdn.com, has changed after baltocdn.com's original registration lapsed.
